content.summary: CarMatch board mechanics. Parking lot puzzle with ~8 lane columns, 7-slot holder, 3-match rule, 7 car colors. 4 boosters: Undo, Lightning, Move(900 coins), Refresh(600 coins).

CM01.name: board_width_cells
CM01.notes: Visual count: ~8 columns of parking lanes

CM02.name: board_height_cells
CM02.notes: Max stack depth observed across columns

CM03.name: car_color_count
CM03.notes: red, orange, yellow, green, cyan, purple, pink

CM05.name: match_threshold
CM05.notes: 3 adjacent same-color cars in holder = auto-match

CM06.name: stack_depth_range
CM06.notes: From board scans across gameplay frames

CM22.name: booster_names
CM22.notes: Visual identification from gameplay bar icons

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract board mechanics design parameters from CarMatch for puzzle genre Design DB
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions for full accuracy
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: First puzzle genre entry in Design DB. CarMatch provides baseline parking-lot puzzle mechanics data.
